Stores facts, relationships, and concepts as subject-predicate-object triples with temporal metadata."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Triple Schema",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | TEXT | UUIDv4 |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"subject"}]," | TEXT | Entity (e.g., \"Alice\") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"predicate"}]," | TEXT | Relationship (e.g., \"knows\") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"object"}]," | TEXT | Target entity or value |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]," | REAL | 0.0–1.0 fact confidence |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source_mem_id"}]," | TEXT | Originating Working Memory entry |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]," | INTEGER | When fact became true |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," | INTEGER | When fact expired (NULL = current) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | INTEGER | Record timestamp
